scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n web,api -c cyan,green "bun --filter web dev" "bun --filter api dev"
scripts.dev:webhooks: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n web,api,stripe -c cyan,green,magenta "bun --filter web dev" "bun --filter api dev" "stripe listen --forward-to http://127.0.0.1:8787/api/webhooks/stripe"
